scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @schejewel/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @schejewel/server build && corepack pnpm --filter @schejewel/web build
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @schejewel/server test && corepack pnpm --filter @schejewel/shared test
scripts.check: corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm test
